backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for a cinematic memory platform, with role-based access control for memory CRUD operations and user profile management, restricting admin actions to admins and secret memory visibility to authenticated users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, intro page, memory wheel, unlock animation, etc.) to their corresponding frontend source files and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and noting that framer-motion has been replaced with pure CSS transitions throughout.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Cinematic Memory Platform', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating all application phases (intro → login → welcome → main → ending/admin) with Internet Identity auth, memory state, secret unlock logic, and rendering of all major page/overlay components.
Admin-only memory list component that displays all memories with thumbnail, metadata, and edit/delete actions, including a two-step delete confirmation flow and CSS keyframe entrance animations.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component that checks caller admin status and renders views for listing, creating, or editing memories, with access denied fallback for non-admins.
frontend/src/components/DynamicBackgroun: Renders a full-screen animated gradient background that cross-fades between scene-specific radial gradients when the sceneType prop changes.
frontend/src/components/EndingPage.tsx: Full-screen ending sequence that phases in typewriter text lines and a group photo with ambient audio, then optionally triggers a restart callback.
frontend/src/components/GoldenCursor.tsx: Custom golden cursor component that replaces the default cursor with a dot and a smoothly lagging trail using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/IntroPage.tsx: Intro splash screen that displays a typewriter-animated quote over a dimmed background, then fades out and calls onComplete after the animation finishes.
frontend/src/components/LocationMarker.t: Positioned map marker component that shows a pulsing golden dot with a label tooltip, scaling on hover and highlighting when active.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, showing a styled form with error handling and a success callback on login.
frontend/src/components/MemoryCard.tsx: Animated card component that displays a memory's photo, title, location, and year with hover effects, special/secret badges, and intersection-observer-driven entrance animation.
frontend/src/components/MemoryForm.tsx: A form component for creating or editing a Memory record, with fields for photo URL, voice note URL, story text, location, year, scene type, and toggle flags, using React Query mutations for save/update.
frontend/src/components/MemoryUnlockAnim: A fullscreen animated overlay that plays a multi-phase reveal sequence (fade, heartbeat, photo reveal, subtitle, handwrite) when a memory is unlocked, with optional voice note audio playback and mute toggle.
frontend/src/components/MemoryWheel.tsx: An interactive circular wheel component that displays memories arranged radially and supports mouse wheel and touch drag to rotate, tracking active index and full rotation count, with a particle effect overlay.
frontend/src/components/ModeToggle.tsx: A pill-shaped toggle button group that lets the user switch between three view modes: wheel, timeline, and map, highlighting the active mode with a gold background.
frontend/src/components/PageTransition.t: A simple wrapper component that fades its children in on mount using a short opacity transition.
frontend/src/components/ParticleEffect.t: A canvas-based animated particle system that spawns upward-drifting gold particles at a configurable intensity, rendered via requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts a new user to enter their name and saves it via a React Query mutation before granting access to the app.
frontend/src/components/RippleEffect.tsx: A renderless component that attaches a global click listener to inject a ripple DOM element at the cursor position and removes it after 700ms.
frontend/src/components/SecretRevealAnim: A fullscreen animation that displays a typewriter-effect message and glowing star icon to announce a secret memory unlock, then fades out and calls onComplete.
frontend/src/components/ThreePhotoCanvas: A React Three Fiber component that renders a photo on a 3D plane mesh with a smooth camera zoom-in animation and subtle idle rotation effect.
frontend/src/components/TimelineMode.tsx: Displays memories grouped by year in a vertical timeline layout with intersection-observer-driven fade-in animations and a decorative center line.
frontend/src/components/TravelMapMode.ts: Renders an India map with clickable location markers (Vizag, Goa, Bangalore) that reveal a filtered grid of memories for the selected location.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: A full-screen welcome overlay that sequentially typewriters two greeting lines and auto-dismisses after completion via a callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence, and status tracking via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profile CRUD, memory CRUD, and viewed-memory tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useTypewriter.ts: A hook that animates text character-by-character with configurable speed and start delay, exposing the current displayed text and completion state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining OKLCH CSS variables for the dark gold theme, and declaring custom animations/styles for the golden cursor, typewriter, heartbeat, film grain, ripple, vignette, and scrollbar.
frontend/src/lib/useIntersectionObserver: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a boolean `isVisible` flag once a referenced div enters the viewport, then disconnects the observer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them to sessionStorage, retrieve them with fallback, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, cinematic gold/black custom colors, custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Dancing Script, Inter), gold glow box shadows, and keyframe animations for accordion, gold pulse, and float effects.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the full-stack cinematic memory website (React + Flask + PostgreSQL), its architectural notes, existing implemented features, required assets, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0.
